Although the profile's very low conscientiousness (4th pct, especially competence 0th and deliberation 0th) and high neuroticism (80th pct, with anxiety at 100th and stress vulnerability at 84th) create strong vulnerability to reinforcing threat-based messages, the baseline conviction is moderately strong (-382) and agreeableness mean is very low (13th pct), tending toward skepticism that can resist even multi-turn pressure; thus movement is clear but moderate.
